a_new_description_textfield_will_appear_:
A new description textfield will appear above the Gridder when you edit projects.
Project descriptions will show up underneath a project thumbnail.
active_state_tooltip_menu_button_style: When your menu uses menu style "button" this will be used for the active menu points. Set your menu to button style in "Customize" → "Menu Style" → "Primary Menu".
adds_extra_youtube_script_and_is_importa: Adds extra YouTube script and is important if you have a YouTube video in an overlay so it pauses when you close the overlay.
after_publishing_your_changes_new_image_: After publishing your changes, new image sizes may not be shown until you Regenerate Thumbnails.

After publishing your changes, new image sizes may not be shown until you regenerate thumbnails. You can do this from the tools section in WooCommerce or by using a plugin such as Regenerate Thumbnails.
After publishing your changes, new image sizes will be generated automatically.
after_you_added_your_webfont_it_is_ready: After you added your Webfont it is ready to use. It will appear in the "Font Family" dropdown menus in
allow_automatic_updates_for_lay_theme: Allow Automatic Updates for Lay Theme
amount_of_pixel_to_move_for_up_and_down_: (Amount of pixel to move for up and down animations)
anchor_expandrow_scroll_space_top_for_de: Anchor-/Expandrow Scroll Space Top for Desktop
anchor_expandrow_scroll_space_top_for_ph: Anchor-/Expandrow Scroll Space Top for Phone
anchor_scroll_duration_description: Animation duration used for anchor scrolling.
anchor_scroll_easing_description: Animation easing used for anchor scrolling.
and_is_active_for_desktop_tablet_only: and is active for desktop/tablet only.
and_remove_any_unused_activations_there_:
and remove any unused activations there, or by clicking "deactivate" below.
Free key usage: .local and localhost domains and subdomains if you activated your key on the main domain.
animated_pixelated_effect_may_not_animat: "Animated Pixelated Effect" may not animate smoothly due to performance.
animations_will_not_work_if_woocommerce_:
Animations will not work if: WooCommerce is enabled, Shortcode is on a page or footer, "Disable Ajax / Compatibility Mode" is active
or if you created a link by coding it yourself and it doesn't contain the data-* attributes.
apply_max_width_of_content_to_burger_ico: Apply max width of content to burger icon for "Page Overlays (Desktop Burger Menu Feature)"
apply_max_width_of_content_to_logo_and_m: Apply max width of content to logo and menu
arrows_in_projects_for_navigation_projec: Arrows in projects for navigation (Project Arrows)
background_opacity_must_be_less_than_100: Background opacity must be less than 100% for blur to show.
because_you_have_yoast_activated_none_of: Because you have Yoast activated, none of these Meta Tags will be used. Instead, Yoast's Meta Tags will be used.
because_you_have_yoast_activated_you_wil: Because you have Yoast activated, you will need to set this in Yoast SEO → Settings → Site basics → Title separator
behavior_when_both_mouseover_image_and_v: Behavior when both Mouseover Image and Video are used for Thumbnails
below_this_browser_width_the_phone_layou: Below this browser-width the phone layout is shown.
below_this_browser_width_the_phone_menu_: Below this browser-width the phone menu is shown.
burger_icon_will_only_align_to_grids_tha: Burger icon will only align to grids that use the same "Frame Left, Right" value as in "Lay Options" → "Gridder Defaults".
caption: Caption
choose_a_page_as_footer_for_categories: Choose a Page as Footer for Categories
choose_a_page_as_footer_for_deck: Choose a Page as Footer for Deck
choose_a_page_as_footer_for_news: Choose a Page as Footer for News
choose_a_page_as_footer_for_pages: Choose a Page as Footer for Pages
choose_a_page_as_footer_for_projects: Choose a Page as Footer for Projects
choose_a_page_as_footer_for_woocommerce_: Choose a Page as Footer for WooCommerce Pages
click_the_image_to_edit_or_update: Click the image to edit or update
click_the_video_to_edit_or_update: Click the video to edit or update
close_modal_on_background_click: Close modal windows on background click
compress_gridder_json_on_save_to_reduce_: Compress Gridder JSON on save to reduce request size. Recommended for servers with strict firewalls or low POST limits.
configure_the_three_button_styles_below_:
Configure the three button styles below. Previously, these settings were in Customize → Buttons.

Insert a button in a text element: Create a link in a text, then select or or to apply the button style.

These are also used for "Load More" buttons for thumbnailgrid, news element, elementgrid and productsgrid.
Or use them in your HTML, anywhere you apply .laybutton1, .laybutton2, or .laybutton3.
cover_options_example: For example you can have a fullscreen image (row background image) and some text on top as a cover for a project.
cover_options_fullscreen_slider_note: When the Fullscreen Slider Addon is active the cover will behave like a default row for that page at the moment.
cover_options_intro:
The first row of your layout will be your cover. A cover is like an introduction to your project, page or category.
The cover will disappear underneath your content when you scroll down. A Cover is always browser filling.
cover_scrolldown_not_recommended_clickab: Not recommended if you have clickable elements on your cover like links, videos, carousels etc.
custom_css_html_use_jquery_instead_of_do: When using JavaScript here, use jQuery instead of $.
custom_link_used_in_elements: Used in Project Thumbnail, Thumbnail Grid and Project Index elements.
custom_project_index_date_field_help: When enabled, a year field appears in the Publish box when editing projects. The Project Index element uses this year for its year column and date sorting instead of the post publish date's year.
customize_colors_and_more_of_the_gridder: Customize colors and more of the Gridder user interface:
customizer_background_description: Background settings for the entire website. If you set a background color in your Gridder, for that page the Gridder background color will show.
customizer_background_video_description: This video should be a .mp4 and landscape format. The video wont have sound on the website.
customizer_cursor_use_dom_cursor_descrip: Try this setting if your cursor image is not sharp. Make sure to use a .svg as your cursor image too. Enabling this, will automatically enable this for all cursors of the whole site and all addon custom cursors too, this is a global setting.
customizer_cursor_x_description: Should be 0 or half of image width
customizer_cursor_y_description: Should be 0 or half of image height
customizer_favicon_description: The Favicon is used as a browser and app icon for your site. Icons must be square, and at least 512px wide and tall.
customizer_filter_underline_offset_descr: Underline Offset settings are the ones used in "Customize" → "Links in Texts"
customizer_frontpage_description: This is the same setting as in Settings → Set Frontpage
customizer_intro_custom_html_description: You need to write your own custom CSS to properly size this in Lay Options → Custom CSS & HTML. Malformed HTML can break the intro and your website. Also please use CSS position absolute or position fixed on your HTML for the setting "Follow mouse movement" to still work correctly.
customizer_intro_disable_scroll_label: Disable scroll while Intro is shown
customizer_intro_section_description: The Intro will only show up if you either use a text overlay, image overlay or use a "Media"
customizer_links_in_texts_panel_descript: A Link in a text is when you added a Text in the Gridder with "+Text" and it contains a link.
customizer_links_mouseover_force_styles_: If checked, the mouseover styles will be applied to all links in text elements, even if you applied different styles in the texteditor or by custom CSS.
customizer_menu_bar_blurry_description: Only works if menubar is a little transparent ("Opacity" less than 100)
customizer_menu_bar_description: These options are for a fixed background bar for the primary menu.
customizer_menu_menupoints_allow_textwra: When off, top-level menu links stay on one line. Does not affect submenus (see Menu Style → Submenus).
Allow text wrap for menu points
customizer_menu_submenu_allow_textwrap_d: When off, submenu links stay on one line on all desktop menus.
customizer_menu_submenu_blurry_descripti: Only works if background is a little transparent ("Opacity" less than 100)
customizer_menu_submenu_button_style_des: Use one of the three global button styles for submenu links.
customizer_menu_submenu_description: Create a submenu in "Appearances" → "Menus" by drag and dropping menu points.
customizer_menu_submenu_follow_parent_li: When clicking on link that opens a submenu, also show this link's page
customizer_menu_submenu_keep_open_descri: If your website does a hard refresh on navigating, the submenu won't stay opened. Like when you have WooCommerce enabled, use a Shortcode or have Disable Ajax Mode enabled.
customizer_menu_submenu_keep_open_label: Keep Submenu open on submenu link click
customizer_menu_submenu_keep_open_until_: Keep Submenu open until another menu point that is not inside a submenu is clicked
customizer_menu_submenu_type_description: If the menu points alignment of your menu is "vertical", the submenu type will always be vertical too.
customizer_mobile_background_fixed_note: Note that on iPhone Safari background images cannot be fixed.
customizer_mobile_background_video_descr: This video should be a .mp4 and portrait format. The video wont have sound on the website.
customizer_mobile_menu_blurry_descriptio: Does not work for Menu Style 3 on mobile devices. Only works if background is a little transparent ("Opacity" less than 100)
customizer_mobile_menu_description: Please note, if you want to build a mobile menu that has images, texts and more, you can alternatively use the "Page Overlay" feature.
customizer_mobile_menu_disable_body_scro: disable scroll of website when menu is open
customizer_mobile_menu_icons_description: Icons only show up if "Mobile Menu Style" is not "Desktop Style"
customizer_mobile_menu_style_3_recommend: When using "Menu Style" → "Style 3", we recommend enabling this setting.
customizer_mobile_spaces_description: These settings are only for automatically generated phone versions of your layouts. To change these spaces for your custom phone layouts go to "Lay Options" → "Gridder Defaults" → "Phone Gridder Defaults".
customizer_mobile_spaces_left_right_labe: Space left and right of Content
customizer_productsgrid_category_filter_:
These are settings for the Category Filter of a Product Thumbnail Grid Element.

How to activate the Category Filter: Check "Show Category Filter" when adding a Product Thumbnail Grid via "+WooCommerce" → "+Product Thumbnail Grid" in the Gridder.
For Mobile put tags in a scrollable line
customizer_productsgrid_tag_filter_descr:
These are settings for the Tag Filter of a Product Thumbnail Grid Element.

How to activate the Tag Filter: Check "Show Tag Filter" when adding a Product Thumbnail Grid via "+WooCommerce" → "+Product Thumbnail Grid" in the Gridder.
customizer_productsgrid_tag_filter_mobil: For Mobile put tags in a scrollable line
customizer_project_arrows_description: When "Arrow Type" is "Text" underline settings of "Links in Texts" will be used
customizer_project_arrows_image_descript: Use an arrow pointing to the right.
customizer_project_description_position_: The "on image" Position depends on the "on image" position of your Project Title. In "Customize" → "Project Thumbnails" → "Project Title" the position can be for example "on image bottom left" or "on image top left". This way your Project Description also be "on image bottom left".
on image, grouped with Project Title Position

Only changes the order when description and title are in the same place: both above image, both on image, or both below image. If they are in different places (e.g. title below, description above), this setting has no effect.
customizer_project_thumbnail_mouseover_b: Use Background Color as fallback behind Mouseover Image
customizer_project_thumbnail_mouseover_i: This is for when you have activated "Lay Options" → "Enable Mouseover Image for Thumbnails".
Fade on mouseover for "Mouseover Image for Thumbnails"
customizer_project_thumbnail_mouseover_m: Show mouseover state on touch or tap, tap again to enter project
When touching thumbnail, show mouseover state
You need to use a mobile device to test this.
customizer_project_thumbnails_panel_desc: A Project Thumbnail is inserted in the Gridder with "+Project".
customizer_search_autosuggest_text_color: Autosuggest Text Color (suggestion list when searching for something)
customizer_search_font_family_label: Font Family for Input and Auto Suggestions
customizer_search_section_description: How to use the Search feature: Create a "Custom Link" menu point with a URL of "#search" (without "") in Appearance → Menus. When clicking on that link, the search overlay you see here will appear.
customizer_search_selection_color_label: Search Text Selection Background Color (Double-click on entered text in search bar. The background color is this color.)
customizer_sitetitle_image_alignment_lab: Image alignment in relation to tagline
customizer_sitetitle_text_align_descript: Text-align is only important if you use multiline text for your site title.
customizer_sitetitle_use_different_tab_t: use different title for browser tab
customizer_thumbnailgrid_category_filter:
These are settings for the Category Filter of a Thumbnail Grid Element.

How to activate the Category Filter: Check "Show Category Filter" when adding a Thumbnail Grid via "+More" → "+Thumbnail Grid" in the Gridder.
For Mobile put tags in a scrollable line
customizer_thumbnailgrid_tag_filter_desc:
These are settings for the Tag Filter of a Thumbnail Grid Element.

How to activate the Tag Filter: Check "Show Tag Filter" when adding a Thumbnail Grid via "+More" → "+Thumbnail Grid" in the Gridder.
customizer_thumbnailgrid_tag_filter_mobi: For Mobile put tags in a scrollable line
customizer_woocommerce_cart_icon_mobile_: This is just a cart icon on the top right of your website.
(Cart menupoint needs to be added to mobile menu)
customizer_woocommerce_cart_menupoint_de: How to add a Cart Menupoint
customizer_woocommerce_checkout_addition: This gap may be needed if you have additional fields in your checkout form. If not, you can set it to 0.
customizer_woocommerce_checkout_coupon_g: Gap between coupon input field and button (px)
customizer_woocommerce_checkout_ship_to_: "Ship to a different address?" Text Format
customizer_woocommerce_checkout_shipping: This space will be shown if "Ship to a different address?" is enabled.
Space between Shipping Address and Order Notes (px)
customizer_woocommerce_checkout_use_plac: When enabled, checkout inputs show normal placeholder text and labels are hidden. When disabled, floating labels are used and placeholders are hidden.
Use placeholder text instead of labels
customizer_woocommerce_mobile_spaces_lef: Space left and right of Content (px)
customizer_woocommerce_product_thumbnail: Add to Cart Button Space Top (px)
Add to Cart Button Text Format
Use Custom Textformat for Add to Cart Button
customizer_woocommerce_sidecart_footer_t: Footer Text Format ("Shipping, taxes, and discounts calculated at checkout")
customizer_woocommerce_single_product_or: Change the order of Title, Price, Add to Cart button and more below. To automatically preview a different product here, go to  "Products" → "Sorting" and move a product to the top.
customizer_woocommerce_single_product_re: "Related Products" / "You may also like…" Headline Text Format
"Related Products" / "You may also like…" Space Bottom(%)
"Related Products" / "You may also like…" Space Top(%)
"Related Products" / "You may also like…" Thumbnail Space between(%)
"Related Products" / "You may also like…" Thumbnail Width(%)
customizer_woocommerce_single_product_se: To automatically preview a different product here, go to  "Products" → "Sorting" and move a product to the top.
customizer_woocommerce_single_product_st: Space between Text and top browser edge when scrolling down
customizer_woocommerce_single_product_ta: Get tabs by using a Plugin like https://wordpress.org/plugins/wb-custom-product-tabs-for-woocommerce/
customizer_woocommerce_single_product_te: This is the text width when your product only has text and not text in product tabs
customizer_woocommerce_single_product_va: When Variation is selected, only show the variation images
This is the text that appears when a variation is selected. It can be the variation description and variation price.
Variations Selectbox & Variations Name Text Format
customizer_woocommerce_spaces_left_right: Space left and right of Content
customizer_woocommerce_thumbnail_inner_s: Title, Short Description, Price, Out of Stock can all have a position on the image. This is the space between the edge of the image and those texts.
customizer_woocommerce_thumbnail_resolut: The higher the number, the better the quality and bigger the file size. 600 is a good value.
customizer_woocommerce_thumbnail_type_de: "WooCommerce type" gives you options for cropping. "Lay Theme type" can potentially lead to faster loading and better image quality. "WooCommerce type" is recommended because all images should have the same aspect ratio for the design to work best.
decide_where_horizontal_scroll_should_be: Decide where Horizontal Scroll should be active by default or selectable individually.
deck_hide_chrome: For Deck Pages, hide site title, menu etc
deck_hide_chrome_help: Hide the site title, menus, and menu bar on Deck slide pages. Turn off to keep them visible.
default_value_for_when_you_right_click_a: Default value for when you right click an element and choose "Make Sticky" in the Gridder:
disable_horizontal_scroll_on_phone_viewp: Disable horizontal scroll on phone viewports
disable_project_overlays_on_instagram_br: Disable Project Overlays on Instagram Browser
disable_simple_custom_post_order_descrip: When enabled, the built-in Simple Custom Post Order plugin (drag-and-drop reorder for Posts/Pages in wp-admin) is not loaded.
disable_smooth_scroll_on_mac: Disable Smooth Scroll on Apple Devices
disable_smooth_scroll_on_mac_description: When enabled, smooth scrolling is disabled on Apple devices (macOS, iPhone, iPad).
disable_video_for_thumbnails_on_touch_de: Disable Video for Thumbnails on Touch Devices
don_t_have_a_ttf_woff2_or_woff_you_can_c: Don't have a .ttf, .woff2 or .woff? You can convert your font file to a supported format on
element_will_animate_in_when_you_scroll_: Element will animate in when you scroll to it.
elements_will_animate_their_opacity_when: Elements will animate their opacity when they appear.
elements_will_start_blurry_and_become_cl: Elements will start blurry and become clear when they appear.
elements_will_start_smaller_and_scale_up: Elements will start smaller and scale up to normal size when they appear.
enable_frame_overflows_for_automatically: Enable Frame Overflows for automatically generated phone layouts
enable_horizontal_scroll_for_this_catego: Enable Horizontal Scroll for this Category
enable_html_shortcode_smart_loading: Enable Smart Loading for HTML and Shortcode Elements
enable_html_shortcode_smart_loading_desc: Turn this on if you have the same HTML or Shortcode element in both your desktop and custom phone layout, and the embedded content (e.g. a contact form, a calendar, a video player, an external embed) misbehaves — for example, only one of the two appears, or the same script tries to load twice. With Smart Loading on, Lay will only mount the version that matches the current screen size, and switch between them when the user crosses the phone breakpoint.
enable_if_your_images_seem_blurry_on_pho: Enable if your images seem blurry on phone
enable_this_setting_if_you_have_issues_w: Enable this setting if you have issues with plugin compatibility.

Enable this setting if you have issues with plugin compatibility.
When activated there will be no page transitions. And when going to the frontpage the intro will always re-appear.
enable_this_setting_if_your_layout_is_em: Enable this setting if your layout is empty on your website. Enable content filter above to still have translated languages in your Gridder Layouts on your website.
enter_a_font_name_the_andlt_linkandgt_ta: Enter a font name, the "<link>" tag and your font-family CSS rule.
enter_a_font_name_the_javascript_code_an: Enter a font name, the JavaScript code and your font-family CSS rule.
enter_custom_html_here_ex_javascript_met: Enter custom HTML here (ex. JavaScript, Meta Tags, etc.), which will be appended to the <head> section of your website's markup. If you use an Analytics Service like "Google Analytics", paste your Analytics Code below. Malformed code may break your site.
find_out_how_to_have_a_different_line_co: Find out how to have a different line color for different pages with
find_overlay_settings_when_you_edit_page: Find Overlay settings when you edit pages
fixed_footer_description: Pins the footer to the bottom of the viewport
fontmanager_empty_state: No fonts yet. Click "Add Font" to get started.
fontmanager_filename_number_error: Error: Please make sure your filename does not start with a number.
fontmanager_filename_starts_number: Please make sure your font filename does not start with a number.
fontmanager_font_name_number_error: Error: Please make sure your font name does not start with a number.
fontmanager_google_families_note: Your link tag contains %s font families. We’ll create fonts for each of them:
fontmanager_google_help_outro: choose your fonts, then click the “Get embed code” button to copy the embed code and paste it below.
fontmanager_invalid_file_type: Please upload a valid font file (.woff, .woff2, .ttf)
fontmanager_link_help: Please insert your "Font name", "Link tag" and "font-family" CSS below. Don't insert any other CSS styles like "font-weight" or "font-style"!
fontmanager_preview_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
fontmanager_script_help: Please insert your "Font name", "JavaScript Embed Code" and your "font-family" CSS below. Don't insert any other CSS styles like "font-weight" or "font-style"!
fontmanager_script_note: Note: Fonts added via script tag may not display correctly until after you refresh the page.
fontmanager_select_valid_file: Please select a .woff, .woff2, or .ttf font file
for_automatically_generated_phone_layout: For automatically generated phone layouts please set the values in "Customize" → "Mobile" → "Mobile Spaces".
for_yoast_s_metatags_to_work_on_your_fro: For Yoast's metatags to work on your Frontpage you need to do this:
formatsmanager_formats_json_parse_error: Text Formats JSON cannot be parsed! Please dont save the textformats and write info@laytheme.com
formatsmanager_preview_sample_2: The quick brown fox brings snacks for friends.
formatsmanager_preview_sample_3: Sunsets love good kerning and tall leading.
formatsmanager_preview_sample_4: Type is what feelings look like in letters.
formatsmanager_preview_sample_5: Coffee, sketches, and carefully tuned line height.
formatsmanager_settings_lineheight_px_he: Be able to set desktop, tablet and phone line heights independently and in px or em.
formatsmanager_settings_padding_bottom_l: Add Padding Bottom Settings (Use this for example if the lower part of g is cut off for a headline)
formatsmanager_settings_tablet_breakpoin: Breakpoint between desktop and tablet version. Needs to be bigger than "Phone Breakpoint" (%s px).
formatsmanager_step1_body_after_add: Note that once a format is created you can't change its name. Edit the format until you're happy, then click
formatsmanager_step1_body_intro: Choose a Format Type below and type in a Format Name. Optionally choose an existing format to create a copy of it. Then click on
formatsmanager_step1_note: Paragraph and Headline formats can only be applied to blocks of text. Character formats can be used for words within a block of text.
formatsmanager_step2_body_intro: Your Text Formats will appear in the "Formats" dropdown menu when you edit texts in "Projects" and "Pages".
formatsmanager_step2_clear_prefix: If you apply your Text Format and it does not look right try this: Select your text, click
formatsmanager_step3_body: In the Customizer your formats show up in the "Text Format" dropdown menus for Site Title, Menu and Project Title.
formatsmanager_validation_name_invalid: Use only letters, numbers, underscores and no special characters.
formatsmanager_variable_no_axes: No variable font axes detected. Make sure the selected font is a variable font.
formatsmanager_what_are_default: By default, the "Default" format is in use everywhere. Give it a try and change it!
formatsmanager_what_are_example: Example: Create a Text Format. Apply it to your menu in the Customizer. Edit the format here → the menu text style changed too.
formatsmanager_what_are_intro: Predefine Text Formats (styles) below and use them on any texts. To have a consistent look, use them in Projects, Pages and the Customizer.
formatsmanager_what_are_list_clean_code: The code of your site will be much cleaner
formatsmanager_what_are_list_phone_style: Set extra styles for the phone view like "Phone Font Size", "Phone Space Top", "Phone Space Bottom"
formatsmanager_what_are_list_space: Define spaces above and below your paragraphs with "Space Top" and "Space Bottom"
going_back_to_a_page_where_load_more_was: Going back to a page where load more was clicked multiple times will keep those items revealed.
hide_current_project_from_thumbnailgrid_: Hide current Project from Thumbnailgrid & Project Index Elements
hide_projects_description: Hides the Projects (Posts) menu item in wp-admin.
hide_site_title_and_menu_on_password_pro: Hide Site Title and Menu on password protected pages
horizontal_scroll_is_disabled_on_any_pag: Horizontal Scroll is disabled on any pages that have Scroll Slider Addon enabled, or Fullscreen Slider Addon or Cover Feature enabled.
if_enabled_show_text_even_when_webfont_h: If enabled, show text even when webfont hasn't loaded.
if_enabled_stretch_element_to_edge_on_ph: If enabled, stretch element to edge on phone layouts too.
if_enabled_videos_might_not_show_up_on_f: If enabled, videos might not show up on Firefox upon navigating on the website.
if_enabled_videos_might_not_show_up_on_s: If enabled, videos might not show up on Safari upon navigating on the website.
if_you_check_apply_desktop_gridder_defau: If you check "Apply Desktop Gridder Defaults" and click
if_you_have_an_issue_with_your_license_k: If you have an issue with your license key send an email to info@laytheme.com.
if_you_see_your_cover_image_appearing_un: If you see your cover image appearing underneath your content, enable this. This is only for very old Safari versions and can lead to issues with Imagehover Addon.
import_dropzone_hint: Drop your Blueprint .zip file here, or click to browse
improves_page_load_speed_when_navigating:
Improves page load speed when navigating between pages of your website.
Is disabled when "Disable Ajax" is on or when WooCommerce or Polylang or WPML is active. Is compatible with qTranslate-XT now! Does not work well with pages that use Shortcodes.

Improves page load speed when navigating between pages of your website.
When "Disable Ajax" is on, the cache still improves full page load speed (server-side). Preloading and instant navigation do not apply. Is disabled when WooCommerce or Polylang or WPML is active. Is compatible with qTranslate-XT now! Does not work well with pages that use Shortcodes.
in_projects_on_the_left_and_right_there_:
In projects on the left and right there will be clickable arrows to go to the previous/next project.
In "Customize" when you navigate inside a project you can style the arrows in the "Project Arrows" panel.
in_some_cases_the_original_uploaded_imag: In some cases the original uploaded image will be shown on your website. The original image is not affected by the quality set here.
in_the_customizer_and_when_you_edit_text: , in the Customizer and when you edit texts in "Projects" and "Pages".
in_the_gridder_when_you_click_horizontal: In the Gridder, when you click "Horizontal Grid" in the top bar you activate this certain layout mode.
in_the_gridder_when_you_right_click_an_e: In the Gridder, when you right click an element you can change it's offset and space top/bottom.
in_the_gridder_you_will_have_new_buttons: In the Gridder you will have new buttons to switch between the desktop and phone layout.
in_the_media_library_files_have_text_fie:
In the media library, files have text fields like: "Alternative Text", "Title", "Caption", "Description".
Choose which field to use for your alt tag.
is_this_the_project_overview_page: Is this the project overview page?
just_in_case_project_overlays_are_buggy_: Just in case Project Overlays are buggy on your IG browser.
keep_menu_point_active_until_next_anchor: Keep menu point active until next anchor
keeps_anchor_menu_point_active_after_its: Keeps an anchor menu point active after its anchor has passed the scroll position, until the next matching anchor is reached. Useful when a short headline or marker row is followed by longer content.
lay_theme_license_key_deactivated_for_yo: Lay Theme License Key deactivated for your site - Next Steps
lay_theme_update_available_view_version_: Lay Theme Update Available! View version %1$s details or update here.
link_modal_style_text_links_info: Style Text Links in Customize → Links in Texts
load_more_button_remember_revealed_eleme: Load More Button: remember revealed elements
lock_editing_and_position_in_element_rig: "Lock Editing & Position" in element right-click menu
logo_and_menu_will_only_align_to_grids_t: Logo and menu will only align to grids that use the same "Frame Left, Right" value as in "Lay Options" → "Gridder Defaults".
make_sure_you_are_using_a_free_webfont_o: Make sure you are using a free webfont or have bought a webfont-license for this font!
mouseover_show_scroll_hidden_menubar_sit: Mouseover-show scroll-hidden menubar, site title, menu
mp4_video_play_icon_vimeo_lay_custom_con: .mp4 Video Play Icon / Vimeo Lay Custom Controls Play Icon
must_be_bigger_than_phone_breakpoint_imp: Must be bigger than phone breakpoint. Important for elements like "Thumbnailgrid", "Elementgrid" and "Project Index".

no_custom_elements_found_in_trash: No custom elements found in Trash
normally_when_appropriate_lay_theme_uses: Normally, when appropriate, Lay Theme uses automatically generated smaller image sizes to speed up loading.
only_desktop_layout_gridder_defaults_and: Only "Desktop Layout Gridder Defaults" and "Custom Phone Layout Gridder Defaults" can be applied to existing layouts.
or_add_by_andlt_linkandgt_tag_and_css: Or add by "<link>" tag and CSS
or_add_by_andlt_scriptandgt_tag_and_css: Or add by "<script>" tag and CSS
password_protection_section_intro: Password protect a page by changing the "Visibility" of it to "Password protected" when editing a page or project.

paste_your_website_address_and_click_fet: , paste your website address, and click "Fetch new scrape information"

please_create_a_page_to_select_it_as_a_h: Please create a page to select it as a header.
please_enter_your_license_key_above_and_: Please enter your license key above and click

please_note_that_webfonts_added_by_andlt: Please note that Webfonts added by "<script>" tag and CSS are not displayed correctly in the text editor. Also, here in the Webfonts Manager they will only be displayed correctly after you refresh the page.
project_thumbnails_section_find_more_set: Find more settings in Customize → Project Thumbnails.
recommended_for_when_you_have_many_image: Recommended for when you have many images on a page.
right_click_on_an_element_in_the_gridder: Right click on an element in the Gridder and define the "y-parallax" value to change the speed of an element while scrolling.
same_as_above_but_just_for_when_you_re_o: Same as above but just for when you're on the phone version.

saving_text_formats_failed_please_try_ag: Saving text formats failed. Please try again.
separator_for_the_page_titles_that_are_s: Separator for the page titles that are shown in your browser tab. Example: "My Website – My Page". Default is "–".
set_your_frontpage_in_settings_reading_y: Set your Frontpage in "Settings" → "Reading" → "Your homepage displays".
set_your_homepage_displays_to_a_static_p: Set "Your homepage displays" to "A static page." Set the "Homepage" to your Frontpage and "Posts page" to "- Select -".
show_a_checkbox_in_the_category_edit_scr: Show a checkbox in the Category Edit Screen to activate Cover for individual Categories
Show a checkbox in the Category Edit Screen to activate Horizontal Scroll for individual Categories
show_a_checkbox_in_the_page_edit_screen_: Show a checkbox in the Page Edit Screen to activate Cover for individual Pages

show_a_checkbox_in_the_project_edit_scre: Show a checkbox in the Project Edit Screen to activate Cover for individual Projects
Show a checkbox in the Project Edit Screen to activate Horizontal Scroll for individual Projects
show_a_select_input_in_the_category_edit: Show a select input in the Category Edit Screen to choose a Footer for individual Categories
show_a_select_input_in_the_deck_edit_scr: Show a select input in the Deck Slide Edit Screen to choose a Footer for individual Deck Slides
show_a_select_input_in_the_page_edit_scr: Show a select input in the Page Edit Screen to choose a Footer for individual News
Show a select input in the Page Edit Screen to choose a Footer for individual Pages
show_a_select_input_in_the_project_edit_: Show a select input in the Project Edit Screen to choose a Footer for individual Projects
show_all_projects_in_admin: Show all projects on one page in admin (for drag-and-drop sorting)
show_all_projects_in_admin_description: When enabled, the %s in wp-admin shows all projects on one page instead of pagination, so you can reorder them with drag-and-drop (e.g. with Simple Custom Post Order).
show_edit_button_when_you_are_logged_in_: Show Edit Button when you are logged in to /wp-admin/
show_fps_counter_when_you_are_logged_in_: Show FPS Counter when you are logged in to /wp-admin/
show_gridder_above_other_plugin_user_int: Show Gridder above other Plugin User Interfaces
show_resize_handles_only_on_mouseover: Show resize handles only on mouseover
since_your_browser_does_not_support_java: Since your browser does not support JavaScript, or it is disabled, please ensure you click the %1$sUpdate Totals%2$s button before placing your order. You may be charged more than the amount stated above if you fail to do so.
some_settings_could_not_be_saved: Some settings could not be saved.
sorry_it_seems_that_there_are_no_availab: Sorry, it seems that there are no available payment methods for your state. Please contact us if you require assistance or wish to make alternate arrangements.
text_selection_color_description: Background color when text is selected on the frontend. Default: light gray.
texts_section_find_more_settings: Find more settings in Lay Options → Textformats and Lay Options → Webfonts.
thank_you_for_supporting_lay_theme: Thank you for supporting Lay Theme! :)
thank_you_your_order_has_been_received: Thank you. Your order has been received.

the_gridder_is_the_interface_you_see_whe: The "Gridder" is the interface you see when you create layouts for Projects, Pages or Categories.
the_starting_blur_amount_0_no_blur_end_b: (The starting blur amount. 0 = no blur. End blur is always 0)
the_starting_scale_of_elements_1_normal_: (The starting scale of elements. 1 = normal size, 0.9 = 90% size. End scale is always 1)
the_website_description_will_show_up_on_: The Website description will show up on Google and when someone shares your website on Facebook or Twitter.

these_defaults_except_for_column_count_w: these defaults (except for Column Count) will be applied to all Grids of existing Projects, Pages and Categories.
this_does_not_actually_set_lay_theme_s_f: This does not actually set Lay Theme's Frontpage, but that setting lets Yoast know which page to get the meta tags from.
this_html_markup_will_appear_right_after: This HTML markup will appear right after the opening <body> tag. Malformed code may break your site.
this_html_markup_will_appear_right_befor: This HTML markup will appear right before the closing </body> tag. Malformed code may break your site.
this_image_will_show_up_when_someone_pos: This image will show up when someone posts your website on Facebook or Twitter.
this_is_a_demo_store_for_testing_purpose: This is a demo store for testing purposes — no orders shall be fulfilled.
this_is_a_setting_for_that_mode: This is a setting for that mode:
this_option_only_makes_sense_for: This option only makes sense for
this_product_is_currently_out_of_stock_a: This product is currently out of stock and unavailable.
this_setting_does_not_apply_to_the_phone: This setting does not apply to the phone version. Enable this if your images seem blurry.
this_should_be_a_jpg_with_1200px_width_a: This should be a .jpg with 1200px width and 630px height to look good on Facebook.
this_text_will_be_added_to_all_image_alt:
This text will be added to all image alt tags. If an image has an Alt text set already, this will just be added to it.
Alt Tags are important for Search Engines. Here you could write your name or company's name or site title.
title: Title
to_let_facebook_know_you_are_using_a_new: To let Facebook know you are using a new image go
uncheck_to_allow_horizontal_scroll_on_ph: Uncheck to allow Horizontal Scroll on phone when a Custom Phone Layout exists.
unexpected_error_the_query_returned_with: Unexpected Error! The query returned with an error.
unfortunately_your_order_cannot_be_proce: Unfortunately your order cannot be processed as the originating bank/merchant has declined your transaction. Please attempt your purchase again.
unregistered_free_version_of_lay_theme_e:
UNREGISTERED/FREE version of Lay Theme. Enter your License Key

updates_can_often_include_new_features_t:
Updates can often include new features that you don't need. Updates can also introduce new bugs unfortunately.
If this is an important website for a client, it may be better to disable updates and only update if needed or periodically under your supervision.
This will also disable updates for Lay Theme Addons.
use_an_alternative_to_object_fit_css_for:
Use an alternative to object fit css for row background images and videos.
Use this setting if sizing of these images/videos looks weird on mobile devices.
use_buttons_for_your_menu_in_customize_m:
Use buttons for your menu:
In Customize → Menu Style → Primary Menu,
set "Menu Style" to "Button".
use_custom_link_for_project: Use custom link for this project
use_custom_link_for_projects_description: When enabled, projects get a "Custom Link" textfield when editing them. You can set a custom URL that will be used instead of the normal project link in Project Thumbnail, Thumbnail Grid and Project Index elements.
use_effect_for_image_lazy_loading: Use Effect for Image Lazy Loading
use_for_example_ease_ease_out_ease_in_ea: Use for example: "ease", "ease-out", "ease-in", "ease-in-out" or "cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1)". If you use a wrong value, the animation will stop working.
use_gzip_for_gridder_json_when_saving: Use gzip for Gridder JSON when saving
use_lug_to_apply_this_button_style: Use .%slug% to apply this button style.
use_menu_point_active_style_for_menu_poi: Use "Menu Point Active" style for menu points that are scrolled to
use_row_background_image_video_object_fi: Use row background image/video object fit CSS compatibility mode
use_showing_transition_when_first_visiti: Use "Showing Animation" when first visiting website or hard reload
use_showing_transition_when_opening_page: Use "Showing Animation" when opening Page Overlays
use_the_deck_feature: Use the Deck feature to build slide-deck presentations on your site. Each Deck post is one slide; viewers navigate with ← / → arrow keys or the on-screen counter.
use_the_news_feature_to_add_a_news_secti:
Use the News feature to add a News section to your website.
Create News posts in "News", then add a News Element to a page in the Gridder with "+More" → "+News Element".
videos_section_intro: If you're creating a video-heavy website, consider uploading your videos on bunny.net (affiliate link). Then use "external video" and paste the video URL. This will increase video loading speed.
videos_section_intro_image_alt: Edit mp4 video modal: Use External Video and URL field.
when_activated_find_options_for_covers_i: When activated, find options for Covers in "Lay Options" → "Cover Options".
when_activated_find_options_in_lay_optio: When activated, find options in "Lay Options" → "Horizontal Scroll".
when_an_image_has_not_loaded_yet_a_place: When an image has not loaded yet, a placeholder rectangle of this color will be visible.
when_checked_the_vimeo_player_api_script: When checked, the Vimeo Player API script (https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js) will not be loaded. This helps with GDPR/cookie compliance if you are not using Vimeo videos.
when_editing_a_project_you_can_insert_a_: When editing a project you can insert a video as a project thumbnail.
when_editing_a_project_you_can_insert_an: When editing a project you can insert another image that will be shown on mouseover.
when_enabled_a_new_post_type_lay_options: When enabled, a new post type "Lay Options" -> "Page Templates" will be created. You can save Gridder layouts as page templates and reuse them later.
when_enabled_a_small_edit_button_will_ap: When enabled, a small "edit" button will appear in the bottom right of the frontend for logged-in administrators.
when_enabled_a_small_fps_counter_will_ap: When enabled, a small FPS counter will appear in the bottom left of the frontend for logged-in administrators.
when_enabled_custom_svg_icons_set_below_: When enabled, custom svg icons set below are used for mute/unmute buttons.
when_enabled_lay_theme_will_not_block_au:
When enabled, Lay Theme will not block automatic theme updates.
This setting is hidden if "Disable Updates for Lay Theme" is enabled above.
when_enabled_menu_points_that_link_to_an: When enabled, menu points that link to anchors will get the "current-menu-item" class when you scroll to their target anchor.
when_enabled_moving_your_mouse_to_the_to: When enabled, moving your mouse to the top or bottom of the page will show the menubar, site title, and menu again if they were hidden by scrolling.
when_enabled_you_will_find_a_button_to_a: When enabled you will find a button to ask questions to a Chatbot.
when_lazy_loading_is_on_images_will_be_l: When lazy loading is on, images will be loaded when you scroll to them.
when_not_using_woocommerce_this_setting_: When not using WooCommerce, this setting will always be disabled.
when_the_fullscreen_slider_addon_is_acti: When the Fullscreen Slider Addon is active the footer will not show up for that page at the moment.
when_using_disable_ajax_this_setting_wil: When using "Disable Ajax" this setting will always be disabled.
when_using_pixelated_effect_please_insta:
When using "Pixelated Effect", please install the Plugin Regenerate Thumbnails to generate the very small 32px images that will be used for the effect.
Once the plugin is installed, go to "Tools" → "Regenerate Thumbnails" and click "Regenerate Thumbnails for all Attachments".
when_using_woocommerce_this_setting_will:
When using WooCommerce, this setting will always be activated.
When activated page transitions and project overlays will be disabled. And when going to the frontpage the intro will always re-appear.
When using WooCommerce, this setting will always be disabled.

will_position_footer_at_bottom_when_cont: Will position footer at bottom when content is smaller than browser-height
yes_underline_this_page_s_menu_point_whe: Yes, underline this page's menu point when we are in a project.

you_can_use_ttf_woff2_or_woff_files_the_: You can use .ttf, .woff2 or .woff files. The .woff font-format is the most widely supported Webfont format.
you_click_on_an_anchor_that_is_linked_to:
You click on an anchor that is linked to #hey. The page scrolls to an element with id="hey".
The offset here is the space between your top browser edge and that container.
